<content>1: // ─── ToolContentStore ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // In-memory store for full tool result content (before truncation).
3: // Keyed by tool ID, with optional session-based grouping for bulk cleanup.
4: // Evicts oldest entries when over capacity.
5: 
6: interface Entry {
7: 	toolId: string;
8: 	content: string;
9: 	sessionId?: string;
10: 	/** Monotonic insertion order for eviction. */
11: 	order: number;
12: }
13: 
14: export class ToolContentStore {
15: 	private readonly entries = new Map<string, Entry>();
16: 	private readonly maxEntries: number;
17: 	private orderCounter = 0;
18: 
19: 	constructor(maxEntries = 500) {
20: 		this.maxEntries = maxEntries;
21: 	}
22: 
23: 	/** Store full content for a tool ID, optionally associated with a session. */
24: 	store(toolId: string, content: string, sessionId?: string): void {
25: 		// If overwriting, remove old entry first (don't double-count)
26: 		this.entries.delete(toolId);
27: 
28: 		this.entries.set(toolId, {
29: 			toolId,
30: 			content,
31: 			sessionId,
32: 			order: this.orderCounter++,
33: 		});
34: 
35: 		// Evict oldest if over capacity
36: 		while (this.entries.size > this.maxEntries) {
37: 			this.evictOldest();
38: 		}
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	/** Retrieve stored content by tool ID. */
42: 	get(toolId: string): string | undefined {
43: 		return this.entries.get(toolId)?.content;
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	/** Remove all entries associated with a session. */
47: 	clearSession(sessionId: string): void {
48: 		for (const [toolId, entry] of this.entries) {
49: 			if (entry.sessionId === sessionId) {
50: 				this.entries.delete(toolId);
51: 			}
52: 		}
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	/** Number of stored entries. */
56: 	get size(): number {
57: 		return this.entries.size;
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	/** Evict the entry with the lowest order (oldest). */
61: 	private evictOldest(): void {
62: 		let oldestKey: string | undefined;
63: 		let oldestOrder = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
64: 
65: 		for (const [key, entry] of this.entries) {
66: 			if (entry.order < oldestOrder) {
67: 				oldestOrder = entry.order;
68: 				oldestKey = key;
69: 			}
70: 		}
71: 
72: 		if (oldestKey !== undefined) {
73: 			this.entries.delete(oldestKey);
74: 		}
75: 	}
76: }

</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── ToolContentStore Unit Tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Tests for in-memory store of full tool result content (pre-truncation).
3: // Verifies: store/retrieve, unknown ID, clearSession, eviction, size.
4: 
5: import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
6: import { ToolContentStore } from "../../src/lib/tool-content-store.js";
7: 
8: // ─── Store / Retrieve ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
9: 
10: describe("store and retrieve", () => {
11: 	it("stores and retrieves content by tool ID", () => {
12: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
13: 		store.store("tool-1", "some content");
14: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBe("some content");
15: 	});
16: 
17: 	it("stores multiple entries independently", () => {
18: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
19: 		store.store("tool-1", "content A");
20: 		store.store("tool-2", "content B");
21: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBe("content A");
22: 		expect(store.get("tool-2")).toBe("content B");
23: 	});
24: 
25: 	it("overwrites content for the same tool ID", () => {
26: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
27: 		store.store("tool-1", "original");
28: 		store.store("tool-1", "updated");
29: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBe("updated");
30: 	});
31: 
32: 	it("stores content with optional sessionId", () => {
33: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
34: 		store.store("tool-1", "session content", "session-abc");
35: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBe("session content");
36: 	});
37: });
38: 
39: // ─── Unknown ID ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
40: 
41: describe("unknown ID", () => {
42: 	it("returns undefined for unknown tool ID", () => {
43: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
44: 		expect(store.get("nonexistent")).toBeUndefined();
45: 	});
46: 
47: 	it("returns undefined after clearing a session that contained the ID", () => {
48: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
49: 		store.store("tool-1", "content", "session-1");
50: 		store.clearSession("session-1");
51: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBeUndefined();
52: 	});
53: });
54: 
55: // ─── clearSession ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
56: 
57: describe("clearSession", () => {
58: 	it("removes all entries for a given session", () => {
59: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
60: 		store.store("tool-1", "a", "session-1");
61: 		store.store("tool-2", "b", "session-1");
62: 		store.store("tool-3", "c", "session-2");
63: 
64: 		store.clearSession("session-1");
65: 
66: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBeUndefined();
67: 		expect(store.get("tool-2")).toBeUndefined();
68: 		expect(store.get("tool-3")).toBe("c");
69: 	});
70: 
71: 	it("does not throw when clearing a nonexistent session", () => {
72: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
73: 		expect(() => store.clearSession("nonexistent")).not.toThrow();
74: 	});
75: 
76: 	it("updates size after clearing session", () => {
77: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
78: 		store.store("tool-1", "a", "session-1");
79: 		store.store("tool-2", "b", "session-1");
80: 		expect(store.size).toBe(2);
81: 
82: 		store.clearSession("session-1");
83: 		expect(store.size).toBe(0);
84: 	});
85: 
86: 	it("entries without sessionId are not affected by clearSession", () => {
87: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
88: 		store.store("tool-no-session", "content");
89: 		store.store("tool-with-session", "content", "session-1");
90: 
91: 		store.clearSession("session-1");
92: 
93: 		expect(store.get("tool-no-session")).toBe("content");
94: 		expect(store.get("tool-with-session")).toBeUndefined();
95: 	});
96: });
97: 
98: // ─── Eviction ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
99: 
100: describe("eviction when over capacity", () => {
101: 	it("evicts oldest entry when exceeding maxEntries", () => {
102: 		const store = new ToolContentStore(3);
103: 
104: 		store.store("tool-1", "first");
105: 		store.store("tool-2", "second");
106: 		store.store("tool-3", "third");
107: 		// At capacity — all should still be present
108: 		expect(store.size).toBe(3);
109: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBe("first");
110: 
111: 		// Adding a 4th should evict the oldest (tool-1)
112: 		store.store("tool-4", "fourth");
113: 		expect(store.size).toBe(3);
114: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBeUndefined();
115: 		expect(store.get("tool-2")).toBe("second");
116: 		expect(store.get("tool-3")).toBe("third");
117: 		expect(store.get("tool-4")).toBe("fourth");
118: 	});
119: 
120: 	it("evicts multiple entries when needed (maxEntries = 1)", () => {
121: 		const store = new ToolContentStore(1);
122: 
123: 		store.store("tool-1", "a");
124: 		expect(store.size).toBe(1);
125: 
126: 		store.store("tool-2", "b");
127: 		expect(store.size).toBe(1);
128: 		expect(store.get("tool-1")).toBeUndefined();
129: 		expect(store.get("tool-2")).toBe("b");
130: 	});
131: 
132: 	it("uses default maxEntries of 500", () => {
133: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
134: 		// Store 501 entries
135: 		for (let i = 0; i < 501; i++) {
136: 			store.store(`tool-${i}`, `content-${i}`);
137: 		}
138: 		expect(store.size).toBe(500);
139: 		// First entry should have been evicted
140: 		expect(store.get("tool-0")).toBeUndefined();
141: 		// Last entry should be present
142: 		expect(store.get("tool-500")).toBe("content-500");
143: 	});
144: });
145: 
146: // ─── Size ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
147: 
148: describe("size", () => {
149: 	it("reports 0 for empty store", () => {
150: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
151: 		expect(store.size).toBe(0);
152: 	});
153: 
154: 	it("reports correct count after stores", () => {
155: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
156: 		store.store("a", "1");
157: 		expect(store.size).toBe(1);
158: 		store.store("b", "2");
159: 		expect(store.size).toBe(2);
160: 	});
161: 
162: 	it("does not double-count overwrites", () => {
163: 		const store = new ToolContentStore();
164: 		store.store("a", "1");
165: 		store.store("a", "2");
166: 		expect(store.size).toBe(1);
167: 	});
168: });

(End of file - total 168 lines)
</content>

<content>1: // ─── Shared Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Types shared between server and frontend.
3: // Imported by src/lib/types.ts (server) and frontend code.
4: 
5: // ─── Todo / Progress ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
6: 
7: export type TodoStatus = "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed";
8: 
9: export interface TodoItem {
10: 	id: string;
11: 	subject: string;
12: 	description?: string;
13: 	status: TodoStatus;
14: }
15: 
16: // ─── Agent / Model / Command info ───────────────────────────────────────────
17: 
18: export interface AgentInfo {
19: 	id: string;
20: 	name: string;
21: 	description?: string;
22: }
23: 
24: export interface ProviderInfo {
25: 	id: string;
26: 	name: string;
27: 	configured: boolean;
28: 	models: ModelInfo[];
29: }
30: 
31: export interface ModelInfo {
32: 	id: string;
33: 	name: string;
34: 	provider: string;
35: 	cost?: { input?: number; output?: number };
36: }
37: 
38: export interface CommandInfo {
39: 	name: string;
40: 	description?: string;
41: 	args?: string;
42: }
43: 
44: // ─── File Browser ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
45: 
46: export interface FileEntry {
47: 	name: string;
48: 	type: "file" | "directory";
49: 	size?: number;
50: 	modified?: number;
51: }
52: 
53: // ─── Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
54: 
55: export interface SessionInfo {
56: 	id: string;
57: 	title: string;
58: 	createdAt?: string | number;
59: 	updatedAt?: string | number;
60: 	messageCount?: number;
61: 	processing?: boolean;
62: }
63: 
64: // ─── Ask User / Questions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
65: 
66: export interface AskUserQuestion {
67: 	question: string;
68: 	header: string;
69: 	options: { label: string; description?: string }[];
70: 	multiSelect: boolean;
71: 	custom?: boolean;
72: }
73: 
74: // ─── Usage ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
75: 
76: export interface UsageInfo {
77: 	input: number;
78: 	output: number;
79: 	cache_read: number;
80: 	cache_creation: number;
81: }
82: 
83: // ─── PTY / Terminal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
84: 
85: export interface PtyInfo {
86: 	id: string;
87: 	title: string;
88: 	command: string;
89: 	cwd: string;
90: 	status: string;
91: 	pid: number;
92: }
93: 
94: // ─── Relay WebSocket messages ───────────────────────────────────────────────
95: 
96: export type RelayMessage =
97: 	// ── Streaming ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
98: 	| { type: "delta"; text: string; messageId?: string }
99: 	| { type: "thinking_start"; messageId?: string }
100: 	| { type: "thinking_delta"; text: string; messageId?: string }
101: 	| { type: "thinking_stop"; messageId?: string }
102: 	// ── Tools ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
103: 	| { type: "tool_start"; id: string; name: string; messageId?: string }
104: 	| {
105: 			type: "tool_executing";
106: 			id: string;
107: 			name: string;
108: 			input: unknown;
109: 			messageId?: string;
110: 	  }
111: 	| {
112: 			type: "tool_result";
113: 			id: string;
114: 			content: string;
115: 			is_error: boolean;
116: 			isTruncated?: boolean;
117: 			fullContentLength?: number;
118: 			messageId?: string;
119: 	  }
120: 	| { type: "tool_content"; toolId: string; content: string }
121: 	// ── Permissions / Questions ────────────────────────────────────────────
122: 	| {
123: 			type: "permission_request";
124: 			requestId: string;
125: 			toolName: string;
126: 			toolInput: Record<string, unknown>;
127: 			toolUseId?: string;
128: 	  }
129: 	| { type: "permission_resolved"; requestId: string; decision: string }
130: 	| { type: "ask_user"; toolId: string; questions: AskUserQuestion[] }
131: 	| { type: "ask_user_resolved"; toolId: string }
132: 	// ── Session lifecycle ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
133: 	| {
134: 			type: "result";
135: 			usage: UsageInfo;
136: 			cost: number;
137: 			duration: number;
138: 			sessionId: string;
139: 	  }
140: 	| { type: "status"; status: string }
141: 	| { type: "done"; code: number }
142: 	| {
143: 			type: "session_switched";
144: 			id: string;
145: 			/** Raw events for client replay (cache hit). */
146: 			events?: RelayMessage[];
147: 			/** Structured messages for HistoryView (REST API fallback). */
148: 			history?: {
149: 				messages: unknown[];
150: 				hasMore: boolean;
151: 				total?: number;
152: 			};
153: 	  }
154: 	| { type: "session_list"; sessions: SessionInfo[] }
155: 	| {
156: 			type: "history_page";
157: 			sessionId: string;
158: 			messages: unknown[];
159: 			hasMore: boolean;
160: 			total?: number;
161: 	  }
162: 	// ── Model / Agent / Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────
163: 	| { type: "model_info"; model: string; provider: string }
164: 	| { type: "model_list"; providers: ProviderInfo[] }
165: 	| { type: "agent_list"; agents: AgentInfo[]; activeAgentId?: string }
166: 	| { type: "command_list"; commands: CommandInfo[] }
167: 	// ── Projects ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
168: 	| { type: "project_list"; projects: unknown[]; current?: string }
169: 	// ── File browser ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
170: 	| { type: "file_list"; path: string; entries: FileEntry[] }
171: 	| { type: "file_content"; path: string; content: string; binary?: boolean }
172: 	| { type: "file_changed"; path: string; changeType: "edited" | "external" }
173: 	// ── Part lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
174: 	| { type: "part_removed"; partId: string; messageId: string }
175: 	| { type: "message_removed"; messageId: string }
176: 	// ── PTY / Terminal ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
177: 	| { type: "pty_created"; pty: PtyInfo }
178: 	| { type: "pty_output"; ptyId: string; data: string }
179: 	| { type: "pty_exited"; ptyId: string; exitCode: number }
180: 	| { type: "pty_deleted"; ptyId: string }
181: 	| { type: "pty_list"; ptys: unknown[] }
182: 	// ── Todo ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
183: 	| { type: "todo_state"; items: TodoItem[] }
184: 	// ── Connection status (for frontend reconnection UI) ────────────────
185: 	| {
186: 			type: "connection_status";
187: 			status: "disconnected" | "reconnecting" | "connected";
188: 	  }
189: 	// ── Plan mode (future feature) ────────────────────────────────────────
190: 	| { type: "plan_enter" }
191: 	| { type: "plan_exit" }
192: 	| { type: "plan_content"; content: string }
193: 	| { type: "plan_approval" }
194: 	// ── Banners ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
195: 	| { type: "skip_permissions" }
196: 	| {
197: 			type: "banner";
198: 			config: {
199: 				id?: string;
200: 				variant?: string;
201: 				icon?: string;
202: 				text?: string;
203: 				dismissible?: boolean;
204: 			};
205: 	  }
206: 	// ── File history / Rewind (future feature) ────────────────────────────
207: 	| { type: "file_history_result"; path: string; versions: unknown[] }
208: 	| { type: "rewind_result"; mode: string }
209: 	// ── Cache / Replay ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
210: 	| { type: "user_message"; text: string }
211: 	/** Synthetic: dispatched locally on session switch to reset HistoryView. */
212: 	| { type: "history_reset" }
213: 	// ── Misc ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
214: 	| { type: "error"; code: string; message: string }
215: 	| { type: "client_count"; count: number }
216: 	| { type: "input_sync"; text: string; from?: string }
217: 	| { type: "update_available"; version?: string };

(End of file - total 217 lines)

<path>/Users/dstern/src/personal/opencode-relay/opencode-relay/.worktrees/ticket-6.2/src/lib/truncate-content.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── Content Truncation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Utilities for truncating large tool result content before relay to clients.
3: // Full content is preserved separately in ToolContentStore for on-demand fetch.
4: 
5: import type { RelayMessage } from "./shared-types.js";
6: 
7: /** Default truncation threshold in characters (~50KB). */
8: export const TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD = 50_000;
9: 
10: /** Suffix appended to truncated content. */
11: const TRUNCATION_SUFFIX = "\n\n[truncated]";
12: 
13: export interface TruncateResult {
14: 	content: string;
15: 	isTruncated: boolean;
16: 	fullContentLength?: number;
17: }
18: 
19: /**
20:  * Truncate content if it exceeds the threshold.
21:  * Returns the (possibly truncated) content, a flag, and the original length
22:  * when truncated.
23:  */
24: export function truncateContent(
25: 	content: string,
26: 	threshold = TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD,
27: ): TruncateResult {
28: 	if (content.length <= threshold) {
29: 		return { content, isTruncated: false };
30: 	}
31: 
32: 	// When the threshold is smaller than the suffix, just slice to threshold.
33: 	const suffixFits = threshold > TRUNCATION_SUFFIX.length;
34: 	const truncated = suffixFits
35: 		? content.slice(0, threshold - TRUNCATION_SUFFIX.length) + TRUNCATION_SUFFIX
36: 		: content.slice(0, threshold);
37: 
38: 	return {
39: 		content: truncated,
40: 		isTruncated: true,
41: 		fullContentLength: content.length,
42: 	};
43: }
44: 
45: /** A tool_result RelayMessage (narrowed). */
46: type ToolResultMessage = Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_result" }>;
47: 
48: export interface TruncateToolResultResult {
49: 	/** The (possibly truncated) tool_result message. */
50: 	truncated: ToolResultMessage;
51: 	/** The full original content, or undefined if no truncation occurred. */
52: 	fullContent: string | undefined;
53: }
54: 
55: /**
56:  * Process a tool_result RelayMessage, truncating its content if over threshold.
57:  * Returns the modified message and the full content (if truncated).
58:  */
59: export function truncateToolResult(
60: 	msg: ToolResultMessage,
61: ): TruncateToolResultResult {
62: 	const { content, isTruncated, fullContentLength } = truncateContent(
63: 		msg.content,
64: 	);
65: 
66: 	if (!isTruncated) {
67: 		return { truncated: msg, fullContent: undefined };
68: 	}
69: 
70: 	return {
71: 		truncated: {
72: 			...msg,
73: 			content,
74: 			isTruncated: true,
75: 			fullContentLength,
76: 		},
77: 		fullContent: msg.content,
78: 	};
79: }

(End of file - total 79 lines)
</content>

<path>/Users/dstern/src/personal/opencode-relay/opencode-relay/.worktrees/ticket-6.2/test/unit/truncate-content.test.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: // ─── truncateContent / truncateToolResult Unit Tests ─────────────────────────
2: // Tests for the content truncation utility used with large tool results.
3: // Verifies: threshold behavior, edge cases, tool_result message truncation.
4: 
5: import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
6: import {
7: 	TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD,
8: 	truncateContent,
9: 	truncateToolResult,
10: } from "../../src/lib/truncate-content.js";
11: import type { RelayMessage } from "../../src/lib/types.js";
12: 
13: // ─── truncateContent ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
14: 
15: describe("truncateContent", () => {
16: 	it("returns content unchanged when under threshold", () => {
17: 		const result = truncateContent("short content");
18: 		expect(result.content).toBe("short content");
19: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(false);
20: 		expect(result.fullContentLength).toBeUndefined();
21: 	});
22: 
23: 	it("truncates content over threshold", () => {
24: 		const longContent = "x".repeat(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD + 100);
25: 		const result = truncateContent(longContent);
26: 
27: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(true);
28: 		expect(result.fullContentLength).toBe(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD + 100);
29: 		expect(result.content.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD);
30: 		expect(result.content).toContain("[truncated]");
31: 	});
32: 
33: 	it("returns content unchanged at exact threshold", () => {
34: 		const exactContent = "y".repeat(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD);
35: 		const result = truncateContent(exactContent);
36: 
37: 		expect(result.content).toBe(exactContent);
38: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(false);
39: 		expect(result.fullContentLength).toBeUndefined();
40: 	});
41: 
42: 	it("handles empty string", () => {
43: 		const result = truncateContent("");
44: 		expect(result.content).toBe("");
45: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(false);
46: 		expect(result.fullContentLength).toBeUndefined();
47: 	});
48: 
49: 	it("accepts custom threshold", () => {
50: 		const content = "abcdefghij"; // 10 chars
51: 		const result = truncateContent(content, 5);
52: 
53: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(true);
54: 		expect(result.fullContentLength).toBe(10);
55: 		expect(result.content.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(5);
56: 	});
57: 
58: 	it("preserves content exactly at custom threshold", () => {
59: 		const content = "abcde"; // 5 chars
60: 		const result = truncateContent(content, 5);
61: 
62: 		expect(result.content).toBe("abcde");
63: 		expect(result.isTruncated).toBe(false);
64: 	});
65: 
66: 	it("exports TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD as 50_000", () => {
67: 		expect(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD).toBe(50_000);
68: 	});
69: });
70: 
71: // ─── truncateToolResult ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
72: 
73: describe("truncateToolResult", () => {
74: 	it("truncates large tool_result content and returns full content", () => {
75: 		const largeContent = "z".repeat(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD + 500);
76: 		const msg: RelayMessage = {
77: 			type: "tool_result",
78: 			id: "tool-42",
79: 			content: largeContent,
80: 			is_error: false,
81: 		};
82: 
83: 		const result = truncateToolResult(msg);
84: 
85: 		// Truncated message should have truncated content
86: 		expect(result.truncated.type).toBe("tool_result");
87: 		expect(result.truncated.content.length).toBeLessThan(largeContent.length);
88: 		expect(result.truncated.isTruncated).toBe(true);
89: 		expect(result.truncated.fullContentLength).toBe(largeContent.length);
90: 
91: 		// Full content should be returned
92: 		expect(result.fullContent).toBe(largeContent);
93: 	});
94: 
95: 	it("passes through small tool_result unchanged", () => {
96: 		const smallContent = "small output";
97: 		const msg: RelayMessage = {
98: 			type: "tool_result",
99: 			id: "tool-99",
100: 			content: smallContent,
101: 			is_error: false,
102: 		};
103: 
104: 		const result = truncateToolResult(msg);
105: 
106: 		expect(result.truncated.content).toBe(smallContent);
107: 		expect(result.truncated.isTruncated).toBeUndefined();
108: 		expect(result.truncated.fullContentLength).toBeUndefined();
109: 		expect(result.fullContent).toBeUndefined();
110: 	});
111: 
112: 	it("preserves all other fields on the message", () => {
113: 		const msg: RelayMessage = {
114: 			type: "tool_result",
115: 			id: "tool-7",
116: 			content: "x".repeat(TRUNCATION_THRESHOLD + 1),
117: 			is_error: true,
118: 			messageId: "msg-123",
119: 		};
120: 
121: 		const result = truncateToolResult(msg);
122: 
123: 		expect(result.truncated.id).toBe("tool-7");
124: 		expect(result.truncated.is_error).toBe(true);
125: 		expect(result.truncated.messageId).toBe("msg-123");
126: 	});
127: });
